---
title: "SelectionPanel.tsx"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\vis\components\SelectionPanel.tsx"
loc: 82
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.55
style_score: 2.62
intel_score: 2.49
overall_score: 4.02
---

## Intent
The `SelectionPanel.tsx` sector implements modular logic focusing on SelectionPanel, SelectionPanel. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SelectionPanel, SelectionPanel. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 2.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 7 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://react)
- [Node](file://../types/index.ts)

### Exports
- `SelectionPanel`
- `SelectionPanel`
